title: Fuller SNOMED CT secondary mapping for licensed consumers
context: Backlog/future (unscheduled). Open vocabularies remain primary; this task adds a fuller SNOMED CT secondary mapping for consumers that are already SNOMED-licensed. SNOMED codes are never redistributed where prohibited and the primary open-vocabulary codes are always retained.
objective: Add a fuller SNOMED CT secondary mapping layer for already-licensed consumers without redistributing SNOMED where prohibited.
acceptanceCriteria: Adds SNOMED CT codes only as a secondary mapping; primary open-vocabulary codes are retained.
SNOMED content is not redistributed where the affiliate license prohibits it.
Mapping is validated and gated so unlicensed consumers receive only the open-vocabulary codes.
No license terms are violated; provenance is preserved.
